description: Style Notedkny Red Delicious Women EDP Spray, comes in a red flacon.Product DetailsTop notes champagne and lychee, middle notes are rasberry, apple and rose and base notes are amber, musk and vanillaCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 100 ml
